text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear some voices as I happen to<n>pass by the
outdoor stage.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's all the hubbub?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hiii, everybody! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Who's the thrill-seeking pearl of the<n>world, here in
all her glittery glory?<n>Why it's me, Seeking the
Pearl!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Urk! Pearl?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Thanks for coming to see me<n>today,
everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Uh, "everyone"?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh! Is she practicing for a concert?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Goodness, talk about a tough crowd.<n>Why so shy?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You! Yes, you over there. What's with<n>the pale
face? Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! You had a little fight with your<n>friend?
That's a doozy.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But don't you fret! I'll whittle those<n>worries of
yours into nothing...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
With a world-class performance<n>that'll blow your
mind! A gift from me<n>to you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: W-world class?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ready or not, here I come! Ooh, sodangerous!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ay! What's happening?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy and lucky and<n>dangerous, oh yeah!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Pearl's getting into the groove!<n>Wait, huh?

text_block_list.name: Imaginary Crowd
text_block_list.text: (Happy! Lucky! Dangerous!)

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for being this beautiful!<n>Apologies for
being this great!

text_block_list.name: Imaginary Crowd
text_block_list.text:
(Don't you worry! Not a problem!<n>You're the best!
You're so<n>wonderful!)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: W-what the heck? I think I'm hearing<n>things...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No way—a crowd is appearing before<n>my very
eyes!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Finally, let's hear it! Who's the most<n>beautiful
pearl of the world?!

text_block_list.name: Imaginary Crowd
text_block_list.text: (Seeking the Pearl! Wooooo!)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: S-such passion!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That was amazing! So this is whata world-class performance looks like!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, were you watching? Hehe,<n>could it be you
too exude world-class<n>potential?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, Pearl!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: N-not quite! I'm not world-class—Iam the world! And the world is me!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oho, that has a nice ring to it. Good<n>luck with that,
hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wow... she's so confident!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Pearl is really something. I don't think<n>I'm
anywhere close to her...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, I gotta keep movin' forward!<n>Victory or bust!
Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I think I've just witnessed something<n>incredible.
